event.description:
This is an open invitation to anyone who would like to get together informally with Martin Odersky. We will follow our usual format:

6:30 - networking, food, refreshments
7:00 - announcements
7:15 - presentation
8:30 - Q&A, more networking afterward

2 free copies of JRebel will be given away.

The event will be held at the Intel Robert Noyce Building (RNB) Rooms 121-123. Please sign in at front desk and collect your name tag.

The nearest Caltrain is Lawrence station which is 10-minute drive away.

WiFi Guest name: Martin Ordesky Password: YTPAEUSQ
event.title: Informal get-together with Martin Odersky
